metadata.scope: Pre-deploy fresh-wallet candidates (Plan A) + already-primed sniper rig (Plan B copy-trade) for L11 Nukex launch.
metadata.claim_basis: All balances and tx histories were freshly fetched from Helius RPC at the timestamp shown. Funding-source labels copied from monitor DB candidates table where applicable; primed/drained verdicts derived from current SOL balance vs funded amount.

tier_s_primed_deploy_ready.funder_chain: L9 Side Funder 52eC8Uy5eFkwpGbDbXp1FoarxkR8MonwUvpm2WT9ni5B (network-map confirmed) → 5MytJoczvqkiYPjTrvviqCjudw46ZwTLaLkQsVUB4irj aggregator → J1Abcje
tier_s_primed_deploy_ready.monitor_status: NOT_MONITORED (2-hop USDC route bypasses MoonPay/CoinSpot sieve)
tier_s_primed_deploy_ready.verdict: Highest-confidence L11 candidate. Pre-staged 4 days ago via deployer-network (L9 Side Funder feeds 5MytJocz aggregator daily via OKX USDC→SOL swaps). Sole survivor of 6 sibling pre-staged wallets — others (8CvuX95R, 37KoU8ys, AfAtbk3A, 7DPDLZDy, 2pJkaJQL) are all drained. Fits sieve range exactly (8.45 SOL within 8.09-14.81 historical band). Operator confirmed adding to whitelist.
Best-fit MoonPay candidate. 13.5h pre-window, exactly textbook timing, untouched, no token activity.
Strong MP2 candidate, 25h pre-window edge of max.
Hidden L11 candidate, MP2 routed through aggregator. Untouched, primed.

tier_a_lower_fit.verdict: CoinSpot route (NOT MoonPay), per project memory deprioritized pre-L11. Top of widened range. Operator whitelisted.
Already touched: holds bonk-suffix mint + 2 Jupiter test swaps. Wallet-warming, not pre-deploy quiet.

newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.label: 5My aggregator (NEW — propose registry add)
newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.verdict: USDC→SOL aggregator for L9-Side-Funder-routed staging. Daily ~700 USDC swap → ~8 SOL → fresh wallet pattern observed Apr 18, 19, 20, 21 (J1Abcje), 22, 23. NOT in network-map. Critical infrastructure to monitor.

newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.label: 5My treasury (NEW — propose registry add)
newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.verdict: Reserve/treasury wallet for the 5My infrastructure. Still 50 SOL. Pings 5MyJWED splitter and recipients in matched-pair coordination patterns. Not the deploy wallet itself.

newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.label: 5My splitter (NEW)
newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.verdict: Multi-recipient splitter for treasury distribution. Tag-coordination wallet.

newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.label: Jetnut Network (existing in registry — flagged as L11 intermediary watchlist)
newly_discovered_network_infrastructure.verdict: Already in network-map. Today bought 1.93M+415K WFXRP and bundled to 3 recipients via 5MytJocz feed. WFXRP is OG-Deployer-created sister token (probably not L11 itself). Network-confirmed activity.

monitor_coverage_gaps_for_l12: MoonPay sieve only catches direct MP→fresh wallets. 2-hop chains bypass: confirmed 4 today (CrCugmcJ→OTC, 2UzMoao3→arb bot, DD2YEZf→v8NL, 32Db8JVK→Axiom bot 9kL5fn).
USDC-funded staging chain entirely bypasses both MoonPay AND CoinSpot sieves. L9 Side Funder + 5MytJocz operate via OKX USDC→SOL swaps. Not surfaced by current monitor at all.
Recommend post-L11: add USDC outflows from L9 Side Funder, FncazAs6, and 5MytJocz as monitor source events. Add 7qN aggregator + 32Db relay outflow detection.
